verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're the wind beneath my wings, You lift me high from earthly things, Up to where the Angels sing, Hallelujah to the King; Oh it's You, Lord, it's You, Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're the breeze within my sail, A constant love that never fails, You lead me where sin cannot prevail, A place You call Your inner veil; Oh it's You Lord, it's You Lord.
